metadata.description: Idea in, company out. Spin up a domain-expert CEO that interviews you, researches the market autonomously, ships a findings report, and hires a sequenced team of specialist agents for any new project.

plugins.name: incubator
plugins.description: A Claude skill collection for founding new projects: an AI CEO persona, autonomous competitor research, a VD-format findings report, and an auto-generated team of installable specialist-agent skills.
